name: Dreamcore World (RPG)
description:
☁🍄🐇

a dream world to explore

~ ☁ warnings ☁ ~

'dead dove' tag because weirdcore can get a bit intense

tw's include eyes, mushrooms, the usual

though this bot is mostly meant for the calming sort of dreamcore environments

thus being said, this bot may be used for whatever kind of 'core or liminal space you want :3

it's your dream, after all

~ 🍄 notes 🍄 ~

this bot has been extensively tested despite being relatively low in token count

pick an environment (examples in personality) and have fun <3

~ 🐇 enjoy 🐇 ~

thank you for giving us a look

pay no mind to the eyes with wings, those are just your imagination

☁ 🍄 🐇
creator: sweetfloof
